title: LangGraph
author: LangChain
copyText:
## Editorial notes

LangGraph is a strong fit for teams building non-trivial agent workflows that need state, branching, and controllable execution.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# LangGraph

Agent orchestration framework for building stateful, controllable, multi-step LLM and agent workflows.
